viral_opportunities.title: @sothebysrealty: Author: @sothebysrealty | Text: Front-row on the Malibu coast, this mid-century...
viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @sothebysrealty | Text: Front-row on the Malibu coast, this mid-century home pairs architectural minimalism with oceanfront living, where a terracotta courtyard leads to sand, surf, and horizon views. 

Extraordinary property of the day. https://www.sothebysrealty.com/eng/sales/detail/180-l-1187-cvddpb/27314-pacific-coast-highway-central-malibu-malibu-ca-90265

📹: niceplacela | URL: https://x.com/sothebysrealty/status/2075226789002019162 | Date: 2026-07-09 | Likes: 17 | Retweets: 5 | Rep
viral_opportunities.author: @sothebysrealty
viral_opportunities.summary: Sotheby's Realty tweets a Malibu mid-century home blending architectural minimalism with a terracotta courtyard and oceanfront setting.
viral_opportunities.engagement_angle: Engage on mid-century minimalism vs. villa massing, and terracotta as a materials/craft talking point for indoor-outdoor courtyards.

viral_reply.body: That terracotta courtyard opening straight to the sand is such a clean move — minimalism that lets the horizon do the work. Gorgeous front-row listing.

viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @j_mann29 | Text: The Bay Area’s AI wealth boom and limited inventory are reshaping how luxury homes are marketed. I analyzed $3M+ deals to see which counties and cities had a greater share of off-market sales than the year prior. https://therealdeal.com/data/san-francisco/2026/san-francisco-leads-bay-area-luxury-private-sales-while-santa-clara-dips/ | URL: https://x.com/j_mann29/status/2075228325451121148 | Date: 2026-07-09 | Likes: 3 | Retweets: 3 | Replies: 0 | Views: 1101 | Author fo
viral_opportunities.author: @j_mann29

viral_reply.body: Off-market share climbing tracks with how discreet HNW buyers have gotten. Curious if the same pattern is showing up in the LA trophy segment post-rebuild.
